{"type":"promotion","date":"04/12","heure":"20:00","caption":"Dive into an ocean of flavors at our sushi bar tonight! 🌊✨ Embark on a culinary journey that will whisk you away to the mesmerizing realm of sushi art. 🍣✨ Indulge in a feast for the senses! #SushiFrenzy #AbsoluteDelight\" 🌊🍣","hashtags":["#SushiBar","#TasteJourney"],"suggested_image":"An expert sushi chef preparing sushi, with a plate of beautifully arranged sushi rolls next to him","image_prompt":{"description":"Sushi chef focused on his art, handcrafting sushi roll with precision. {"type":"Engaging","caption":"Fresh ingredients meet traditional Asian cuisine in our new, halal-certified kitchen! Meals made with love, just for you. #RoubaixFoodies, Isn't it about time you stopped by? 😉","hashtags":["#FoodieRoubaix","#HalalAsianCuisine","#MadeWithLove","#FoodLover","#InstaFood","#FoodieAdventures","#CuisineDuMonde","#RestaurantRoubaix","#HalalFrance","#GourmetExperience"],"suggested_image":"Picture of our head chef in action, cooking up an array of enticing dishes.","image_prompt":{"description":"Vibrant and lively photo of a chef tossing colourful veggies and ingredients in a sizzling wok at an open kitchen. The background should subtly imply the restaurant setting.","style_keywords":["Vibrant","Passionate","Dynamic","Authentic","Engaging"],"camera":"Nikon D850","lens":"Nikon AF-S NIKKOR 24-70mm f/2.8G ED","post_processing":"Enhance saturation for a vibrant look, adjust sharpness for clarity, slight vignetting to focus attention on the chef and the cooking action"}}

{"type":"Engaging","caption":"When life gives you lemons, trade them for spring rolls! 🍋🔄🥡 Who's hungry?","hashtags":["#FoodLove","#AsianCuisine","#Foodie","#Halal","#RoubaixRestaurant","#Foodstagram","#TasteTheDifference","#FreshIngredients","#SpringRollsHumor","#DeliciousFood"],"suggested_image":"Picture of a vibrant plate full of tasty, freshly made spring rolls, with lemon slices arranged around playfully. The colors should be warm and inviting, making the food look appetizing.","style_keywords":["Vibrant","Warm","Playful","Appetizing","Fresh"],"camera":"Canon EOS R","lens":"Canon RF 28-70mm F2 L USM","post_processing":"Enhance the colors to make them pop out more. {"type":"Engaging","caption":"Did somebody say Noodles? We've got it steaming, sizzling, and 100% halal! Come, let's make your day noodle-licious! 🍜","hashtags":["#Foodie","#RestaurateurLife","#FirstHalalAsian","#RoubaixEats","#HalalCuisine","#NoodleLovers","#Foodstagram","#TasteAsia","#HalalNoodles","#FoodLovers"],"suggested_image":"A vibrant picture of a bowl of steaming Asian noodles, chopsticks poised, ready to dig in. A little vignetting would give attention to the main subject. Try to achieve warm white balance to reinforce the inviting atmosphere."}}

{"type":"Engaging","caption":"Life is a combination of magic and pasta and we're spicing it up with some Asian flair. 🥡 Who’s going to join us for a meal?","hashtags":["#RoubaixRestaurants","#AsianHalal","#FoodLovers","#DiningOut","#Foodstagram","#AsianCuisine","#HalalEats","#CulinaryExperience","#GourmetAsian","#Deliciousness"],"suggested_image":"An aesthetically pleasing table setting at your restaurant featuring colorful Asian halal dishes, with your restaurant's ambience as the backdrop.","image_prompt":{"description":"A vibrant image capturing the essence of your Asian halal cuisine in a casual yet sophisticated restaurant setting. The photo focuses on the detailed presentation of the food, contrasted with the elegant simplicity of the dining environment.","style_keywords":["vibrant","detail-oriented","casual sophistication"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 50mm f/1.2L","post_processing":"Increase color saturation to emphasize the vibrancy of the dish. Sharpen the image to highlight the detail and texture of the food."}}

{"type":"Engaging","caption":"Craving some amazing Asian flavors that are halal? No more waiting. Step into the flavor-filled world of the first Halal Asian Restaurant in Roubaix. #TreatYourTastebuds.","hashtags":["#halalfood","#asiancuisine","#roubaix","#foodheaven","#flavorjourney","#tastebudadventures","#culinaryinnovation","#restaurateur","#halalscene","#foodstagram"],"suggested_image":"An array of vibrant, colorful Asian dishes arranged beautifully on the table, giving a cozy, inviting feel. An assortment of colorful Halal Asian food is being prepared and arranged temptingly. Warm, inviting light fills the kitchen framing the expert hands of our chefs.","style_keywords":["Vibrant","Authentic","Warm"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 24-70mm f/2.8L II USM","post_processing":"Boost saturation for vibrant colors, enhance warmth for a cozy atmosphere and apply soft focus effect for depth."}}

{"type":"Engaging","caption":"Who said Monday blues can't be mouth-watering Asian cuisine flavors? Meet your Monday motivator, your tastebuds' true friend! Here is to a week full of culinary adventures! #MondayBluesBuster","hashtags":["#FoodieLife","#RoubaixRestaurants","#HalalCuisine","#AsianFoodLovers","#FoodAdventures","#MondayMotivation","#TasteBudsTravel","#HalalFoodie","#Epicurean","#CulinaryJourneys"],"suggested_image":"An appealing snapshot of the irresistible signature Asian dish served at the restaurant, in attractive plating, with a vibrant, lively background showcasing the restaurant's ambiance.","image_prompt":{"description":"Picture showcases a beautifully plated Asian dish, rich in colors and textures, with a hint of steam rising suggesting it's fresh from the kitchen. The background subtly highlights the inviting, tastefully decorated interior of a bustling restaurant.","style_keywords":["Vibrant","Appetizing","Authentic"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 50mm f/1.2L","post_processing":"Saturation boost for vibrancy, depth of field adjustment for focus on the dish, and minor color correction."}}

{"type":"professional and educational","caption":"From a humble beginning to making a mark in the culinary world! 🍽️ Journeying from traditional Asian roots, we pivoted to become the first hallal Asian restaurant in Roubaix. It was far from easy, but with resilience, we turned this challenge into an opportunity. We learned that running a restaurant isn't just a business, it's about crafting an experience for our patrons. Let this serve as a reminder that with passion and hard work, any formidable challenge can be turned into a rewarding experience. Never stop pushing the envelope! ⭐","hashtags":["#RestaurantJourney","#HallalFood","#AsianCuisine","#RoubaixRestaurant","#FoodInnovation"],"suggested_image":"An image showcasing picturesque scenes from the restaurant - displaying a spread of hallal Asian food, the dining area, and the team working behind the scenes.","image_prompt":{"description":"A beautifully composed photograph capturing the essence of a bustling hallal Asian restaurant, from a spread of delicious cuisine to the dedicated team diligently working.","style_keywords":["vibrant","authentic","culture"],"camera":"Sony A7R IV","lens":"Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM Lens","post_processing":"Boost saturation for vibrant colors, increase sharpness for clarity, adjust brightness and contrast for balanced lighting"}}

{"type":"professional and educational","caption":"Step into a world where tradition meets innovation.🚀 As the first Asian Halal restaurant in Roubaix, France📍, we have been fortunate enough to interact with a diverse audience, each with unique tastes and preferences. Our success hasn't come easy, but through embracing the rich tapestry of Asian flavors, ♨️ and integrating them with Halal practices, we've found a recipe for success.🍜🔥 Remember, the greatest journeys often start at the most unexpected places. Challenge the norms, embrace diversity, and you will undoubtedly discover a unique path to success.🌟🥠","hashtags":["#AsianCuisine","#HalalFood","#InnovationInDining","#CulturalIntegration","#RestaurantBusiness"],"suggested_image":"A picture of our signature dish in the making. Smoke tenderly rising from the wok, symbolizing the fusion of two cultures, with the staff in uniform serving with a warm smile.","image_prompt":{"description":"The bustling kitchen of our restaurant during peak hours. Staff preparing meals with utmost care and dedication.","style_keywords":["High-Contrast","Dynamic","Cultural"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 24-70mm f/2.8L II USM","post_processing":"Color grading to bring out the vibrancy of the food, subtle clarity enhancement to make the details pop, slight vignette for focus."}}

{"type":"authentic and direct","caption":"Did you know that we're the first Halal Asian restaurant🥘 in Roubaix? Discover the unique fusion of flavours that we bring to our dishes every day. Have you ever tried Halal Asian cuisine before? Let us know and share your thought! We can't wait to know what you think. #RethinkCuisine","hashtags":["#Threads","#HalalCuisine","#AsianFlavors","#RouxThreads","#FoodInRoubaix"],"suggested_image":"An image showcasing the vibrancy of the restaurant, with a special focus on the colorful, delicious food. It may be a professional shot of a bestselling dish, expertly plated, alongside customer-facing view of the restaurant environment.","image_prompt":{"description":"The bustling atmosphere of our restaurant captured in mid-evening, spotlight on our plated dishes, capturing the essence of what we provide to our customers.","style_keywords":["Food Photography","Vibrant","Authentic"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 24-70mm f/2.8L II USM","post_processing":"Enhanced saturation for vibrancy, selective focus for depth of field effect, increased contrast for sharpness"}}

{"type":"créatif et léger","caption":"Who said you can't have the best of both worlds? Dive into the rich flavors of Asia with a twist of Halal at Bluesky, the first Halal Asian restaurant in Roubaix.  Satisfaction is just a bite away! Comment your favorite dish from our menu! 🍜💙","hashtags":["#BlueskyRoubaix","#HalalFoodJourney","#AsianFusion"],"suggested_image":"A humorous GIF of a chopstick rookie attempting to pick up noodles, overlayed with a speech bubble saying: 'Practice makes perfect, especially with our Ramen!'","image_prompt":{"description":"An enticingly prepared dish amidst menu cards from the Bluesky restaurant, emphasizing a blend of Asian and Halal cuisine.","style_keywords":["vibrant","culinary_art","cultural_blend"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 50mm f/1.2L","post_processing":"High dynamic range, Color correction for vibrancy and warmth, Soft background blur"}}

{"type":"creative and light","caption":"Spice up your day with an Asian Delight! Have a glimpse of our authentic Halal Asian dishes. But beware, it may cause extreme drooling! #FoodieAlert 🍜😋","hashtags":["#BlueSkyDiner","#HalalAsianCuisine","#RoubaixEats"],"suggested_image":"An aesthetically pleasing shot of our best savory dishes, styled in a unique pattern, topped with vibrant garnish and colorful sides to highlight the diversity of our menu. Perhaps, a close up shot of our chef in action, showcasing his skills in the kitchen for a homely touch.","image_prompt":{"description":"Midjourney, imagine a warm evening with the perfect golden sunlight spilling into our inviting dining space. The table filled with an array of our popular dishes. In the background, our dedicated chef expertly plating up another masterpiece.","style_keywords":["Warm","Inviting","Authentic"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 50mm f/1.2L","post_processing":"Increase saturation for color pop, focus on details with high clarity and sharpness, soft vignette for an inviting atmosphere and depth of field effect to highlight the subject."}}

{"type":"visually appealing and emotional","caption":"Feast your eyes on the vibrant colors and indulge your taste buds in the rich flavors of the first Halal Asian restaurant in Roubaix. Come, join us in the celebration of culture and taste.","hashtags":["#HalalFood","#AsianCuisine","#RoubaixEats","#FoodLovers","#Foodie","#NewRestaurant","#HalalAsianFood","#FrenchFoodies","#RestaurantOpening","#FoodGram"],"suggested_image":"A high angle shot capturing the vibrant dishes on the table, with a soft focus on the restaurant's ambient atmosphere in the background.","image_prompt":{"description":"A vibrantly colored and appetizingly plated array of dishes on a rustic wood table, showcasing the unique Asian cuisine offered by restaurant; in the soft-focused background detail the restaurant's inviting atmosphere.","style_keywords":["vibrant","rustic","soft-focus"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 24-105mm","post_processing":"Color correction, brightness adjustment, soft vignetting"}}

{"type":"informel et engageant","caption":"Storytime, everyone! 🥢 When we were kids, my siblings and I always revelled in our mum's signature dish -the satisfying blend of Asian spices and flavors was unparalleled! 🔥 Fast forward to today, our humble restaurant in Roubaix is the first of its kind to serve halal Asian cuisine. ☝️ Each dish carries with it a history, a cherished memory, or a family tradition. 🍽️ Do you have a favorite tradition you share with your loved ones? Drop your cherished memory below 👇 Don't forget to visit us this week to try the aromas of our yesteryears 🥘 #KeepingTheLegacyAlive.","hashtags":["#FoodStories","#AsianCuisine","#HalalFood","#RoubaixRestaurant","#FamilyTradition"],"suggested_image":"A picture of the restaurant's hearty signature dish on a wooden table with the restaurant's interior as the background. The table has a warm, cozy candlelight to illuminate the richness of the cuisine.","image_prompt":{"description":"The main subject is a serving of our signature Asian dish, steaming hot, set on a rustic wooden table. The restaurant's environment in the background adds ambiance, heightened by the golden light from a candle on the table, casting a warm glow on the dish. The people in the soft-focus background sharing laughter encapsulate feelings of joy and family. The colours are warm and inviting, dominated by the golden light of the candle and the rich hues of the food. The texture contrast between the robust wooden table and the sleek ceramic plate adds a dynamic element. Windows in the background allow a natural muted light to complement the warm candlelight.","style_keywords":["Rustic","Warm","Homely","Cozy"],"camera":"Nikon D850","lens":"Nikkor 24-70mm f/2.8","post_processing":"Soft focus on the background for depth, maximise details of the food on the plate, gently enhance the warm tones of the image for an inviting look."}}

{"type":"informel et engageant","caption":"Let me take you back a couple of years, when I first dreamed of opening the first Asian Halal restaurant in Roubaix. It was a bold dream, but with perseverance, we made it. Every time I look inside our bustling kitchen and see our chefs handcraft your meals, it takes me back to that dream. We're so proud to be part of your culinary journey. 🥘🎉 Have you tried our special dish yet? 💬🍽️ #TasteWithUs","hashtags":["#AsianFoodRoubaix","#HalalCuisine","#TasteAdventure","#FoodLovers","#RoubaixEats"],"suggested_image":"Vibrant image of the special dish, beautifully presented with all of its rich components, set against the backdrop of the warmly lit, bustling restaurant kitchen.","image_prompt":{"description":"The main subject of the picture is a delicious Asian dish, intricately presented on an earthy, rustic plate that sits on a polished wooden counter. Behind the counter, we get a glimpse of the warm, bustling kitchen filled with focused, passionate chefs. They're working on their culinary crafts, their movements a harmonious dance of culinary creation. Splashes of vibrant ingredients and steam rise in the background, adding life and texture. A soft light filters from overhead, casting a warm glow to highlight the rich colors, textures and weight of the food, reflecting off polished utensils and the stainless steel surround. The image evokes emotions of anticipation, hunger, and warm homeliness. **The image will be free of any text or symbols.**","style_keywords":["warmth","vibrancy","anticipation"],"camera":"Nikon D850","lens":"Nikon 50 mm 1.4G for food photography with a shallow depth of field","post_processing":"Enhancement of the warm tone, contrast adjustments for depth, light HDR effect for added vibrancy"}}

{"type":"informel et engageant","caption":"Throwback to when we served our first Pho. We call it our 'Humble Beginnings'. That moment ignited our passion to share the unique consistency of Halal Asian flavors we love so much. Now we've grown into Roubaix's first Halal Asian restaurant, every dish cooked with love and served with a smile. Fancy a taste? Pop in today and your tastebuds will thank you! 👩‍🍳🍲🥢","hashtags":["#AsianHalalFood","#RoubaixRestaurant","#TasteOfAsia","#FoodieFriday","#CulinaryAdventure"],"suggested_image":"An aesthetic, vibrant shot of a bowl of Pho being served in our restaurant","image_prompt":{"description":"The main subject is a passionately served bowl of Pho, with a server's hands gently placing the dish on a rustic table. The environment is lively— a bustling restaurant filled with satisfied customers. The emotions conveyed are joy and anticipation. The dominant colors are the warm hues of the food contrasting with the cool tones of the restaurant. The textures include the velvety broth, the rough wooden table, and the smooth gleam of cutlery. The primary light source is soft indoor lighting, secondary being the natural light from windows. The image should be extremely detailed, perfectly sharp showcasing each element with high precision. There should be no text, symbols, or writings in the picture.","style_keywords":["editorial","vibrant","portrait"],"camera":"Nikon D850","lens":"85mm f/1.8G for focused and detailed subject","post_processing":"Enhancement of colors, slight blur on background for depth of field, and slight grain for texture."}}

{"type":"informel et engageant","caption":"As a kid, I was always fascinated by the colorful, flavorful dishes my Asian friends brought for lunch. The bold flavors, the unique techniques, and the tradition behind each dish ignited my love for food and culture. That spark led me to establish the first halal Asian restaurant in Roubaix, France. Here we honor heritage and celebrate diversity. Come join us on this flavorful adventure! 🍜🥢 #GoodFoodGoodMood","hashtags":["#AsianCuisine","#FoodJourney","#RoubaixEats","#HalalFoodie","#InclusiveFoodCulture"],"suggested_image":"A vivid picture of a table filled with an array of Asian dishes, from a bowl of steaming hot ramen, stir-fry on another side with vibrant veggies sprinkled with sesame seeds, to dim sum in the bamboo steamer. Bubble tea with colorful straws and some fortune cookies as a sweet finale.","image_prompt":{"description":"Imagine a close-up of a rustic wooden table in a warmly lit restaurant. The table set with an array of mouth-watering Asian dishes. A bowl of steaming hot ramen filled with noodles, succulent slices of beef, chopped spring onion and a half-sliced egg with a perfect yolk, a plate of stir-fry with vibrant veggies sprinkled with sesame seeds, bamboo steamers filled with tempting dim sum, bubble tea with colorful straws and some fortune cookies to finish the feast. The colors are vivid, from the deep brown broth of the ramen, the green veggies, the white steamers, to the multi-colored bubble tea. The textures are contrasting - the sleek noodles, the crackly stir-fry, the soft dim sum. The light should come from a warm, overhanging light source, casting generous shadows and giving depth to the image.","style_keywords":["Rustic","Warm","Inviting","Vivid"],"camera":"Canon EOS 5D Mark IV","lens":"Canon EF 50mm f/1.4 USM","post_processing":"Accentuating the food colors while making sure the overall tone is warm and inviting. Use of soft HDR to bring details from darker areas, and a gentle vignetting to draw attention to the center of the photo."}}

{"type":"informal and engaging","caption":"Remember that time when you first tried an Asian dish and it felt like a festival of flavors dancing on your tongue?🍜  We do too! This is why we're dedicated to bringing you the most authentic halal Asian cuisine in Roubaix.🌏 Pop in and spark your taste buds with our delicacies this week. {"type":"visuellement attrayant et émotionnel","caption":"Embark on a gastronomic journey right at your doorstep.
